prompt: AI data, evaluation, observability, RAG, and memory startups that raised $50M+ in 2025-2026. For each: name, amount, date, what they do, the wedge. Cite sources.
content:
**Arize AI and Braintrust are the primary matches identified for significant funding rounds ($50M+) in 2025–2026 within the specified categories (primarily AI observability and evaluation).** No clear matches surfaced for pure RAG, memory, or standalone AI data startups meeting the $50M+ threshold in new rounds during this exact period based on available results (earlier or smaller rounds exist for some RAG-related players like Deepset/Haystack). Fiddler AI had a $30M Series C in early 2026 (total funding reached ~$100M), so it does not qualify on a single recent round of $50M+.[[1]](https://www.fiddler.ai/press-releases/fiddler-raises-30m-series-c)[[2]](https://newmarketpitch.com/blogs/news/ai-governance-top-startups-fundraising)

### Arize AI
- **Amount**: $70M Series C (largest-ever disclosed round in AI observability at the time).[[3]](https://arize.com/blog/arize-ai-raises-70m-series-c-to-build-the-gold-standard-for-ai-evaluation-observability/)
- **Date**: February 20, 2025.[[3]](https://arize.com/blog/arize-ai-raises-70m-series-c-to-build-the-gold-standard-for-ai-evaluation-observability/)
- **What they do**: AI observability and evaluation platform focused on LLMs, generative AI, and AI agents. It provides monitoring, troubleshooting, explainability, tracing, experimentation, and continuous improvement across the AI lifecycle (development to production). Features include agent observability, dashboards, and tools to ensure reliability at scale.[[3]](https://arize.com/blog/arize-ai-raises-70m-series-c-to-build-the-gold-standard-for-ai-evaluation-observability/)[[4]](https://arize.com/)
- **The wedge**: Strong first-mover position in AI-specific observability/evaluation (vs. general ML or traditional observability tools); unified platform bridging dev and prod with production data feeding evaluations; emphasis on enterprise-scale reliability for agents/LLMs; backed by strategic investors (e.g., Datadog, PagerDuty) and led by Adams Street. Total funding reached >$130M.[[5]](https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/20/arize-ai-hopes-it-has-first-mover-advantage-in-ai-observability/)[[6]](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/arize-ai-secures-70m-series-c-to-fix-ais-biggest-problem-making-llms-and-ai-agents-work-in-the-real-world-302381601.html)

### Braintrust (Braintrust Data)
- **Amount**: $80M Series B (at ~$800M valuation).[[7]](https://www.braintrust.dev/blog/announcing-series-b)
- **Date**: February 17, 2026 (announced around mid-to-late February 2026).[[7]](https://www.braintrust.dev/blog/announcing-series-b)
- **What they do**: AI-native observability and evaluation infrastructure/platform for production AI. It enables teams to measure, evaluate, trace, and improve AI models/products with exhaustive tracing (prompts, tool calls, context, metadata) and fast querying via its proprietary Brainstore database. Used for development and production monitoring of AI applications.[[7]](https://www.braintrust.dev/blog/announcing-series-b)[[8]](https://news.crunchbase.com/venture/biggest-funding-rounds-cloud-energy-ai-world-labs/)
- **The wedge**: Purpose-built as an “AI-native” observability layer (distinct from retrofitted traditional tools); performance edge from Brainstore (claimed 80% faster tracing); focus on production AI infrastructure and iteration loops; strong investor backing (ICONIQ leading, with a16z, Greylock, Elad Gil returning) and customers like Notion, Replit, Cloudflare, and Stripe. Total funding ~$121M+.[[9]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DU6lJQuEZLt/?hl=en)

These align with the observability and evaluation categories. Funding in AI infrastructure/tooling (including these areas) remained active in 2025–2026 amid broader AI investment trends, though mega-rounds often concentrated in frontier models or other infra. Sources are primarily company announcements, Crunchbase/Tracxn aggregates, TechCrunch, and PR coverage from the results. Additional or later rounds may exist beyond the search window.
